scope.summary: Runs profile login and trusted session setup before opening the READ_ONLY transaction backstop, while retaining the backstop immediately afterwards.
out_of_scope: The per-request rollback and READ_ONLY backstop.
Live VPD fixtures, credential configuration, and proxy authentication.

entry_points.name: profile connection setup
entry_points.trace: profile_session_statements validates login statements, login scripts, and trusted setup before appending SET TRANSACTION READ ONLY for READ_ONLY profiles.

entry_points.name: C5 protected-profile setup ordering fixture
entry_points.trace: connect::tests::c5_a_protected_posture_runs_trusted_setup_before_the_read_only_backstop proves trusted DBMS_SESSION setup precedes the retained read-only backstop; the writable and protected posture companion checks also pass.

limitations: Scoped offline verification passed: cargo fmt -p oraclemcp-core -- --check; cargo test -p oraclemcp-core --lib connect::tests::c5_a_protected_posture_runs_trusted_setup_before_the_read_only_backstop -- --nocapture; cargo test -p oraclemcp-core --lib connect::tests:: -- --nocapture (27 passed).
No live table-backed VPD setup is claimed; the deterministic C5 fixture verifies the connection-time statement ordering required for it.
